GTYPES.item: TYPES: zkonv TYPE TABLE OF konv.

GCODING.item: * set textnames for header, adress and footer
SELECT SINGLE bukrs FROM vbrk INTO coco
SELECT SINGLE adrnr FROM kna1 INTO addr
SELECT SINGLE mc_street FROM adrc INTO address
SELECT SINGLE aubel FROM vbrp INTO aubel WHERE
SELECT SINGLE bstkd FROM vbkd INTO ref WHERE vbeln
SELECT SINGLE stcd1 FROM kna1 JOIN vbrk
SELECT SINGLE kunnr FROM kna1 JOIN vbrk

FCODING.item: * Valid numbers for IF_TABLE: 1 text from sales organisation
* default: read text from sales org

CODE.item: SELECT * FROM KONV INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE zr0x_tab
SELECT kunnr FROM vbpa INTO num1
WHERE vbeln EQ gs_hd_ref-order_numb AND parvw EQ 'RG'.
SELECT name1 FROM kna1 INTO name1
SELECT kunnr FROM vbpa INTO num2
WHERE vbeln EQ gs_hd_ref-order_numb AND parvw EQ 'WE'.
SELECT name1 FROM kna1 INTO name2
SELECT belnr FROM bsad INTO acc_num
SELECT belnr FROM bsid INTO acc_num

sf:CODE.CAPTION: To read PO No and date

CODE.item: SELECT BSTKD FROM VBKD INTO PO_NUM
SELECT BSTDK FROM VBKD INTO PO_DATE

item.CAPTION: To read PO No and date

CODE.item: SELECT EIKTO FROM KNB1 INTO CUST_NO

item.TDLINE: Tax exempt as per §6a UStG (turnover tax law)
Tax exempt as per §6a UStG (turnover tax law)

CODE.item: READ TABLE ZR0X_TAB INTO wa_zr0x WITH KEY KPOSN =
*After S/4 conversion table KONH does not contain actual data
* SELECT single knumh INTO zknumh from KONH
* SELECT SINGLE kbetr INTO wa_zr0x-kbetr FROM KONP
*After S/4 conversion new table PRCD_ELEMENTS replace KONV & KONH
SELECT SINGLE kbetr INTO wa_zr0x-KBETR FROM PRCD_ELEMENTS
*READ TABLE GS_IT_KOND INTO WA_GS_IT_KOND WITH KEY KSCHL = 'K007'.
delete GS_HD_KOND where kwert is INITIAL .

item.TDLINE: <K>Down Payments Made at Time of Invoice Creation</>
<K>Down Payments Made at Time of Invoice Creation</>
<K>Down Payments Made at Time of Invoice Creation</>
<K>Down Payments Made at Time of Invoice Creation</>
